channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as U.S. Intelligence Director to care for husband
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the Director of National Intelligence, announced her resignation effective June 30, 2026, citing her husband Abraham's recent diagnosis with a rare form of bone cancer. Gabbard, a forme...

item.title: Anurag Kashyap’s ‘Bandar’ trailer released, starring Bobby Deol in a controversial role
item.description: Filmmaker Anurag Kashyap has unveiled the trailer for his latest film ‘Bandar’, featuring Bobby Deol in a pivotal role as a popular television star who faces serious allegations from his ex-girlfriend...

item.title: Arizona AG clarifies legal protections for election workers amid ballot drop box dispute
item.description: Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes intervened in a controversy in Maricopa County regarding ballot drop boxes after county recorder Justin Heap, aligned with MAGA, threatened criminal penalties for e...

item.title: Low Ebola Risk for Fans, but DR Congo Team Faces Travel and Preparation Challenges
item.description: Health experts are assuring World Cup supporters that the risk of Ebola infection during the tournament is very low. The current Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo has caused over ...

item.title: PenCom Allows Pension Funds to Participate in Dangote Refinery IPO
item.description: The National Pension Commission (PenCom) don grant Pension Fund Administrators (PFAs) one-time waiver to fit invest pension money for Dangote Petroleum Refinery & Petrochemicals FZE (DPRP) IPO. The ci...

item.title: Lella Ford and Joaquin Arce Compete in Pinoy Music Challenge Show

item.title: Tanzania Adapts Ford Rangers and Mercedes Trucks for Dual Road and Railway Use on SGR
item.description: Tanzania Railways Corporation (TRC) imefanikiwa kubadilisha magari aina ya Ford Ranger na mabasi ya kibiashara ya Mercedes Benz kufanya kazi kwenye reli ya Standard Gauge Railway (SGR). Hii ni hatua k...

item.title: Yanga SC Reclaims Top Spot After Okello Breaks Record
item.description: Tanzanian football side Yanga SC has bounced back strongly in the league after a disappointing goalless draw in their last match. The team showed great attacking quality in their recent game, with str...

item.title: Spotify Partners with Universal Music Group on Generative AI Tools for Fan-Created Covers and Remixes
item.description: Spotify and Universal Music Group (UMG) have announced a new licensing agreement that will enable the development of generative AI music models on the Spotify platform. The deal covers both recorded m...

item.title: Ontario Superior Court prevents Region of Waterloo from clearing Kitchener encampment
item.description: Ontario Premier Doug Ford has strongly criticised a recent decision by an Ontario Superior Court justice that prevents the Region of Waterloo from removing residents from an encampment at 100 Victoria...

item.title: Roger Stone Associate Arrested in Wisconsin for Methamphetamine and Multiple Charges
item.description: Jacob Engels, a 34-year-old associate of long-time Trump ally Roger Stone, was arrested in Wisconsin for felony methamphetamine possession. Engels is also linked to the far-right group Proud Boys. Acc...

item.title: Stephen Colbert’s The Late Show Ends After Over Three Decades on Air
item.description: Stephen Colbert’s long-running Late Show concluded its final episode on Thursday, marking the end of a significant era in American late-night television. The show, which began in 1993, was cancelled b...

item.title: Goldie Boutilier recognized with multiple awards at East Coast Music Awards
item.description: Goldie Boutilier, a talented musician from Cape Breton, Nova Scotia, was celebrated for her outstanding contributions to the regional music scene at the East Coast Music Awards Gala. She received mult...

item.title: Durban Tap Water Experiences Taste and Odour Changes, Residents Reassured About Safety
item.description: Residents in Durban have recently raised concerns over the municipal tap water, citing changes in taste, odour, and appearance, which some associate with gastrointestinal symptoms such as diarrhoea, n...

item.title: Traffic Adjustments Announced for Great Glebe Garage Sale by Community Association
item.description: The Glebe Community Association in Ottawa has issued a notice regarding upcoming traffic restrictions for the Great Glebe Garage Sale. Residents and visitors should anticipate temporary road closures ...

item.title: Queensland Labor examines leadership and factional dynamics after Stafford byelection
item.description: Queensland Labor is grappling with internal pressures following a narrow win in the Stafford by-election, which exposed vulnerabilities in what was once a safe seat. Party leader Steven Miles retains ...

item.title: Police Officers in Enugu Face Forced Relocation After Alleged Sale of Barracks
item.description: For many police officers wey dey Enugu State, na serious gbege don land. Dem dey fear as dem hear say dem quarters wey dem dey live for barracks don reportedly sell to private buyers. The O/C of Works...

item.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Vancouver's World Cup Attendance and Economic Impact
item.description: With just three weeks until Vancouver hosts the first of its seven FIFA World Cup 2026 matches on June 13, uncertainty surrounds the city’s expected economic benefits. Provincial authorities estimated...

item.title: Romualdez camp asserts strong evidence in extortion case vs. PGMN founder
item.description: The legal team of Leyte Representative Ferdinand Martin Romualdez has expressed confidence in their case against Franco Mabanta, founder of Peanut Gallery Media Network (PGMN), and four others. The ex...

item.title: Rare 1991 Polaroids of Kate Moss Rediscovered by Photographer Michel Haddi
item.description: In 1991, photographer Michel Haddi captured intimate Polaroids of supermodel Kate Moss in a simple London studio session intended for British GQ. Unlike conventional fashion shoots, these images were ...
